history.content:
<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The next cell in front of me at row 02 column C contains lava (`L`), which is deadly. I need to avoid moving forward. To proceed safely toward the goal located at row 04 column D, I should turn downwards. From facing right, turning right will make me face down (`v`).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell directly in front of me at row 03 column B is floor (`.`), safe to move into. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at row 04 column D. Thus, I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front of me at row 04 column B is floor (`.`), safe to move forward. Moving forward will get me closer to the goal at row 04 column D. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down (`v`). The cell in front at row 05 column B is a wall (`#`), so moving forward is not possible. To reach the goal at row 04 column D, I need to face right (`>`). Currently facing down, I will turn left (counter-clockwise) to face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04, column B facing right (`>`). The cell in front at row 04, column C is floor (`.`), safe to move forward. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at row 04, column D. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I'm at row 04, column C facing right (`>`). The cell ahead at row 04, column D is the goal (`G`). Moving forward will reach the goal safely.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
